sections.paragraph:
- Original: στάχυς

- Transliteration: Stachus

- Phonetic: stakh'-oos

- Definition:

1. an ear of corn or of growing grain

- Origin: from the base of G2476

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From the base of G2476; a head of grain (as standing out from the stalk): - ear (of corn).
